PluginData.Author: OwendB
PluginData.Tooltip: Enforces block limit rules by player, faction, and grid
PluginData.Description: BlockLimits is a Space Engineers dedicated server plugin for Magnetar that enforces block limit rules by player, faction, and grid. It supports grid size limits, optional import of the vanilla block type limits, and the !blocklimit chat commands for inspecting and managing limits in-game. Built on the Magnetar PluginSdk with its config UI rendered by Quasar, it also exposes a cross-plugin API (BlockLimits.PluginApi.Limits.CanAdd) that other plugins can call to gate block placement against the configured limits.
